summary: Tested /feed page performance after EmbedSocial widget optimization. All performance targets met: page load <3s (0.52s), CLS <0.1 (0.018), FPS 61, touch response <100ms (69ms). Widget loads correctly with lazy loading via IntersectionObserver. All old widget traces (SociableKIT, Elfsight, Taggbox) removed. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: EmbedSocialWidget component correctly uses IntersectionObserver for lazy loading (lines 56-91 in SocialFeed.jsx)
CSS contain properties properly set: contain: content, content-visibility: auto, min-height: 450px
Widget script loaded with async and defer attributes for non-blocking behavior
3 EmbedSocial scripts detected (ht.js, iframe.js, universal-popup.js) - this is expected EmbedSocial behavior, not duplicate loading
